assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types in the table and throughout the document: End-of-Life warnings, Security patch available, Auto-upgrade scheduled, and New version available

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns End-of-Life warnings as HIGH priority and security patches as MEDIUM priority, contradicting the expectation that security patches should be highest priority

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response clearly states EoS warnings are HIGH priority requiring action to 'Plan upgrade within 30 days of EoS warning' and provides specific upgrade options and commands

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides specific actions for auto-upgrade notifications including verifying timing, checking conflicts with code freezes/high-traffic periods, and provides a triage checklist

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response indicates security patches should be reviewed and scheduled within 7-30 days based on severity, and mentions assessing criticality which implies potential for expedited handling

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes 'New version available' as INFO level with 'No action (unless accelerating manually)' and states 'No immediate action required - these are informational'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Cloud Monitoring alerting policies' and provides specific guidance for notification filtering and routing, though it focuses more on email rules and Slack/PagerDuty integration

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release notes anywhere as a source for understanding version changes
